svg.title: SecureGuard AI — High level design
svg.desc: Three zones: developer surfaces on the left, the SecureGuard platform in the centre, and external dependencies on the right. Shows major system boundaries and primary data flows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the VS Code LSP client connect to SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does the pre-commit hook client connect to SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions PR bot connect to SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does the CLI connect to SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the API gateway do in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the request router do in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the scanner module do in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the AI remediator module do in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What is the remediator registry in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the policy engine do in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the response formatter do in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('What does the audit log store in SecureGuard?')
sendPrompt('How does SecureGuard use npm audit and pip-audit?')
sendPrompt('How does SecureGuard call the Claude API?')
sendPrompt('How does SecureGuard use the GitHub API for PR comments?')
